title: Build Crypto Portfolio Dashboard with Live Charts

steps.description: Define domain models for tracking crypto assets, including value objects and entities.
steps.done_condition: Domain models are defined and reviewed.

steps.description: Define ports/interfaces for the application to communicate with external services.
Implement use cases for retrieving and managing crypto portfolio assets and values.
steps.done_condition: Use cases are implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Develop primary adapters using Vite for the user interface components that visualize live data.
steps.done_condition: Primary UI components are developed and functional.

steps.description: Integrate live data sources for real-time price updates in the dashboard.
steps.done_condition: Live data integration is tested and operational.

steps.description: Setup composition root to wire up all components and services together.
steps.done_condition: Composition root is implemented and all components are integrated.

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement caching strategies and handle errors gracefully.
riskRegister.risk: Dependency on external real-time data sources may affect performance.

successCriteria: Dashboard displays real-time asset prices and visualizations properly.
Users can track portfolio performance and see profit/loss metrics.
All components are modular and maintainable.
